system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_baogia_htr_danhsach_export","body":"
CREATE PROC TR_BAOGIA_HTR_DANHSACH_EXPORT (@hehang nvarchar(max))
AS
BEGIN
	WITH LatestPrices AS (
		SELECT A.id, B.hehang, A.masp, B.tensp, A.tygia_usd, A.sotien_baogia, A.ngaytao,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.masp ORDER BY A.ngaytao DESC) as rn
		FROM tr_baogia_htr_danhsach A
			INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp
		WHERE B.hehang = @hehang
	)
	SELECT * 
	INTO #DANHSACH_BAOGIA
	FROM LatestPrices WHERE rn = 1;

	-- TABLE 1
	SELECT A.hehang, A.masp, A.tensp, 
		tygia_usd = A.tygia_usd, 
		sotien_baogia = A.sotien_baogia, 
		thanhtien_govan = B.thanhtien_govan, 
		thanhtien_veneer = B.thanhtien_veneer,
		thanhtien_ngukim
	FROM #DANHSACH_BAOGIA A
		LEFT JOIN (SELECT baoGiaID, SUM(thanhtien_govan) thanhtien_govan, SUM(thanhtien_veneer) thanhtien_veneer FROM tr_baogia_htr_govan WHERE isOutsourcing = 1 GROUP BY baoGiaID) B ON A.id = B.baoGiaID
		LEFT JOIN (SELECT baoGiaID, SUM(Price) thanhtien_ngukim FROM tr_baogia_htr_tong WHERE Nhom = N'Ngũ Kim' GROUP BY baoGiaID) C ON A.id = C.baoGiaID
	--GROUP BY A.hehang, A.masp, A.tensp

	-- TABLE 2
	SELECT A.hehang, A.masp, A.tensp, B.nguyenlieu,
		tygia_usd = MAX(A.tygia_usd),
		m3_tc = SUM(B.m3_tc),
		thanhtien_govan = SUM(B.thanhtien_govan),
		thanhtien_veneer = SUM(B.thanhtien_veneer)
	FROM #DANHSACH_BAOGIA A
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_htr_govan B ON A.id = B.baoGiaID
	WHERE B.nguyenlieu NOT IN ('', '0')
	GROUP BY A.hehang, A.masp, A.tensp, B.nguyenlieu

	DROP TABLE #DANHSACH_BAOGIA;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.latestprices","dbo.tr_baogia_htr_danhsach","dbo.tr_baogia_htr_govan","dbo.tr_baogia_htr_tong","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-cte","has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
